query: SELECT pu.username, pu.displayName, pu.role, r.name AS restaurant_name, r.slug FROM partner_users pu JOIN restaurants r ON pu.restaurantId = r.id WHERE pu.active = 1 ORDER BY r.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2T8Mwbb7L99VC4H.3906649335dc --database Evw5QZUwinvym6RWSTYRUE --execute SELECT pu.username, pu.displayName, pu.role, r.name AS restaurant_name, r.slug FROM partner_users pu JOIN restaurants r ON pu.restaurantId = r.id WHERE pu.active = 1 ORDER BY r.id;
